title: Junior Sales Support
description:
About MIJ Hub

My Inspiring Journey (MIJ) Hub is a fast-growing private school and NGO dedicated to supporting individuals aged 4 to 40 with diverse learning needs. For over 13 years, we have been creating meaningful impact through education, vocational training, and community programmes.

As part of our growth, we are expanding internationally with our first overseas centre, MIJ International in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. To support our mission sustainably, MIJ Hub also runs several for-profit ventures, including our food & beverage brands, which help subsidise education and make quality services more accessible to families.

Join MIJ Hub and be part of a purpose-driven organisation that values inclusivity, learning, and making a real difference in the community.

Job Title: Junior Sales Support (Part-Time)

The Junior Sales Support role is an entry-level position that supports our sales and outreach efforts across MIJ Hub and its related brands. This role is suitable for someone who enjoys interacting with people, is organised, and is keen to learn about sales, customer engagement, and basic CRM systems.

You will support student enrolment enquiries, donation outreach, and product sales for our café and retail brands. Training will be provided, and you will work closely with the Sales and Marketing teams.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the Sales Specialist with day-to-day sales and outreach activities

  • Assist with customer follow-ups via phone calls, emails, and WhatsApp

  • Respond to basic customer enquiries and route more complex issues to the team

  • Help update and maintain customer records in HubSpot (training provided)

  • Assist in preparing simple sales materials and tracking enquiries

  • Coordinate with internal teams (e.g. Marketing) to ensure smooth communication

  • Support basic administrative tasks related to sales and customer engagement

Requirements

  • Diploma or currently pursuing a Diploma / Degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field

  • Comfortable communicating with people and willing to learn customer engagement skills

  • Good verbal and written communication skills

  • Basic computer skills (Google Docs, spreadsheets, messaging platforms)

  • Able to manage tasks responsibly and follow up on assigned work

  • Positive attitude, willingness to learn, and able to work in a team environment

  • Prior sales or retail experience is a plus, but not required

Working Arrangement

  • Part-time role

  • 3 days per week

  • 9:00am – 4:00pm

postedCompany.description:
About MIJ Hub Ltd

My Inspiring Journey Hub (MIJ Hub) is a leading and rapidly growing private school and non-governmental organization (NGO) dedicated to transforming the lives of individuals aged 4 to 40 with diverse learning needs. Through our comprehensive educational programs, vocational training, and community integration initiatives, we have been creating positive change locally for over 13 years. Our mission is to be the ultimate one-stop center for the special needs community in the region.


At MIJ Hub, we are pioneers in innovation. By managing multiple for-profit ventures, including a food and beverage (F&B) arm, we generate sustainable income streams that allow us to provide subsidies, ensuring parents and students have access to affordable, high-quality education. Join MIJ Hub and become part of a vibrant, dynamic team committed to driving financial sustainability, fostering inclusivity, and expanding our reach to make a real difference in the community.
postedCompany.name: MIJ HUB LTD.
